claimBoundary: Exposed diagnostic probes for language-to-place resolution. Results on this set cannot promote a resolver or support a generalization claim. A promotion decision needs an unmounted holdout population.
grammar: Each sourceText is a full mission sentence for mission-compiler compileMission. The probed reference sits in the role field; the other role uses a verbatim governed label.
controlLane: Constrained resolution in public/simulatte/mission/mission-compiler.js: exact_world_label or constrained_fuzzy_place within the shipped edit-distance bound; everything else refuses with origin_not_grounded or destination_not_grounded.

kinds.exact: Verbatim governed label. Control must resolve. Regression floor for any challenger.
kinds.typo_within: Misspelling inside the constrained edit-distance bound. Measured against the shipped compiler: single-character deletions resolve via constrained_fuzzy_place.
kinds.typo_beyond: Misspelling past the constrained bound. Measured against the shipped compiler: character transpositions and heavier mangling refuse. A challenger may resolve these.
kinds.paraphrase: Descriptive reference to a real landmark or well-known attribute. Control refuses by design; a challenger may resolve.
kinds.ambiguous: Reference matching several governed places. Gold outcome is refuse; a challenger that guesses one is scored wrong.
kinds.out_of_world: Real place outside the governed world. Gold outcome is refuse for every lane.
